name: virtual-herbal-garden-monorepo
description: Virtual Herbal Garden Platform — Monorepo (frontend + backend)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend
